summary.data_source: PLFS 2023-24, Ministry of Statistics & Programme Implementation

assessment.description: Each industry and occupation is scored 0-10 on a single axis: how much will AI reshape the work? The key signal is whether the core work product is fundamentally digital. Jobs done entirely on a computer score 7+; jobs requiring physical presence score lower.

signals.label: Digital Core Work
signals.description: Can the central output be created, analyzed, or communicated on a computer?

signals.label: Routine Information Processing
signals.description: How much of the work is structured, repeatable, and language/data-driven?

signals.label: AI Productivity Leverage
signals.description: Even without full automation, can AI sharply raise output per worker?

signals.label: Physical Presence Barrier
signals.description: Jobs anchored in physical environments have lower exposure ceilings.

tier_definitions.label: Minimal
tier_definitions.description: Physical, hands-on work in unpredictable environments.

tier_definitions.label: Moderate
tier_definitions.description: Mix of physical and knowledge work. AI meaningful but partial.

tier_definitions.label: High
tier_definitions.description: Predominantly knowledge work. AI tools already useful.

tier_definitions.label: Very High
tier_definitions.description: Almost entirely digital. Major AI-driven restructuring ahead.

assessment.coverage_note: Industry rectangles sized by validated PLFS worker distribution. Occupation shares from PLFS NCO Division data. AI scores assigned using the single-axis rubric calibrated against 342 US BLS occupation assessments.

industries.name: Agriculture, Forestry & Fishing
industries.ai_rationale: Agriculture: Physical, outdoor, minimal digital. Hands-on work in unpredictable environments.

industries.name: Construction
industries.ai_rationale: Construction: Physical, site-based. Some digital in design/BIM but execution is manual.

industries.name: Manufacturing
industries.ai_rationale: Manufacturing: Mixed — assembly automation vs craft. CAD/CAM and quality control increasingly digital.

industries.name: Trade (Wholesale & Retail)
industries.ai_rationale: Trade: E-commerce disruption, inventory/pricing AI, demand forecasting. Increasingly digital.

industries.name: Transportation & Storage
industries.ai_rationale: Transportation: Route optimization, autonomous vehicles long-term. Physical execution today.

industries.name: Education
industries.ai_rationale: Education: AI tutoring, content generation, grading. But teaching requires human presence.

industries.name: Accommodation & Food Services
industries.ai_rationale: Accommodation/Food: Service-oriented, hospitality requires human presence. AI for booking/scheduling.

industries.name: Other Service Activities
industries.ai_rationale: Other Services: Mixed personal services — repair, religious, political activities.

industries.name: Information & Communication
industries.ai_rationale: IT/Communication: Almost entirely digital. Coding, data analysis, communication — AI frontier.

industries.name: Public Administration & Defence
industries.ai_rationale: Public Admin: Bureaucracy, e-governance push. Mix of paperwork and public-facing roles.

industries.name: Health & Social Work
industries.ai_rationale: Health: Diagnostics AI advances, but physical care, empathy, and procedures require humans.

industries.name: Household Activities
industries.ai_rationale: Household Activities: Domestic work, physical presence required. No digital core.

industries.name: Financial & Insurance
industries.ai_rationale: Finance/Insurance: Fintech, algorithmic trading, robo-advisory, fraud detection. Highly digital.

industries.name: Administrative & Support Services
industries.ai_rationale: Admin/Support: Data entry, scheduling, customer service — structured information processing.

industries.name: Professional & Scientific
industries.ai_rationale: Professional/Scientific: Research, consulting, analytics — predominantly knowledge work.

industries.name: Electricity, Gas & AC Supply
industries.ai_rationale: Electricity/Gas: Grid management, SCADA systems increasingly digital. AI optimizes distribution.

industries.name: Water Supply, Sewerage & Waste
industries.ai_rationale: Water/Waste: Physical service delivery, field operations. Limited digital core work.

industries.name: Mining & Quarrying
industries.ai_rationale: Mining: Physical extraction, some automation potential in planning/geology.

industries.name: Real Estate
industries.ai_rationale: Real Estate: Valuation models, digital platforms, documentation. Mix of digital and physical.

industries.name: Arts, Entertainment & Recreation
industries.ai_rationale: Arts/Entertainment: Content generation AI, but creativity and performance valued.

occupations.name: Skilled Agricultural Workers
occupations.ai_rationale: Skilled Agricultural Workers: Manual farming, animal husbandry. Physical, outdoor, minimal digital.

occupations.name: Elementary Occupations
occupations.ai_rationale: Elementary Occupations: Manual labor, cleaning, carrying. Physical tasks, low digital content.

occupations.name: Service Workers & Sales
occupations.ai_rationale: Service/Sales Workers: Customer interaction, physical presence. AI helps but doesn't replace.

occupations.name: Craft & Related Trades
occupations.ai_rationale: Craft/Trades: Hands-on skilled work — welding, carpentry, masonry. Physical barrier to AI.

occupations.name: Professionals
occupations.ai_rationale: Professionals: Knowledge work, research, analysis — heavy AI augmentation potential.

occupations.name: Plant & Machine Operators
occupations.ai_rationale: Machine Operators: Repetitive but physical. Increasing automation in factories.

occupations.name: Legislators, Senior Officials & Managers
occupations.ai_rationale: Legislators/Managers: Decision-making aided by AI analytics, but leadership requires judgment.

occupations.name: Technicians & Associate Professionals
occupations.ai_rationale: Technicians: Technical diagnostics, data interpretation. AI-assisted work growing rapidly.

occupations.name: Clerks
occupations.ai_rationale: Clerks: Data entry, filing, record-keeping — routine information processing, highly automatable.
